page_metadata.biotools__summary: FAIRSCAPE is a reusable computational framework, enabling simplified access to modern scalable cloud-based components. It fully implements the FAIR data principles and extends them to provide FAIR Evidence, including provenance of datasets, software and computations,as metadata for all computed results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FAIRSCAPE is a reusable computational framework, enabling simplified access to modern scalable cloud-based components.
